{{Quote|Please sit down…have some Corellian whiskey … I am afraid it is time to discuss the nasty business of having to push you out an airlock.|Celis Mot|<ref name="O" />}}
'''Celis Mott''' was a famous [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A rotund [[Human/Legends|Human]], Mott possessed a beard and kept his eye brows dyed and trimmed in the [[Peluchian]] style. Less debonair than he thought himself,<ref name="O" /> he unified all the pirate factions in his sector into a [[Nanth'ri Pirates|single fleet]] that roamed and raided the [[Nanth'ri Route]]. Mott authored a set of rules for piracy conduct called [[Ship's Articles]] which would become, with modifications, widespread among pirates even after his mysterious disappearance.<ref name="RP">{{JournalCite|2|Rebel Privateers!}}</ref>

Later, it was discovered that Mott had been abducted by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. While being transported on [[Celestial (starship)|''Celestial'']] to an Alliance penal colony, Mott and fellow prisoner [[Bane Nothos]] escaped and took control of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. However, when the escapees tried to jump to [[Lightspeed/Legends|lightspeed]], all aboard were lost in [[Otherspace]]. The [[Charon/Legends|Charon's]] [[Death mist|red mist]] took a toll on Mott, who went insane aboard the alien ship ''[[Desolate]]''. Mott was subsequently killed by Alliance agents who had staged a rescue attempt.<ref name="O" />

Years later, [[Xishel]], a [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] employed [[Marka Durn]] to locate the lost treasure of Mott. Durn found the treasure on a remote asteroid, but died soon after.<ref name="IA">''[[Instant Adventures]]''</ref>
